output.dependency: These columns appear to describe the same hospital record: a facility identifier, facility name, street address, optional second address line, city, state, ZIP code, county, phone number, hospital type, and ownership/status. The values are consistently tied to the same institution across rows.

These columns appear to be syntactically and semantically linked quality-measure fields: a measure category, a specific measure code, a full textual description of the measure, and a composite identifier combining state and measure code.

The measure code determines the meaning of the measure description, while the reported percentage/result and patient count are specific outcomes for that measure. Rows show different measures under the same category with matching measure descriptions and result fields.
